hooks.command: FILE="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/$(echo $TOOL_INPUT | python3 -c 'import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("path",""))' 2>/dev/null)"; if [[ "$FILE" == *components/landscape/* ]]; then echo '⚠️  WARNING: You just modified a protected landscape file. Verify this was intentional.' >&2; fi; exit 0

CMD=$(echo $TOOL_INPUT | python3 -c 'import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("command",""))' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'rm.*components/landscape'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Cannot delete landscape renderer files without human approval.' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
